Buena Mano
House For Sale in Oton
Pulo Maestra Vila, Oton, Iloilo
Lot 5 & Lot 6, Blk 5, Savannah Trails A, Brgy. Polo Maestra Bita, Oton, Iloilo Property Classification : Yellow Tag (with special concerns either on title, tax declaration, possession or other property documents) BIDDING GUIDELINES 1. Sale is on an “AS IS-WHERE IS” basis. 2. Bidders should make reasonable examination of property title/s and tax declaration/s and inspection of the physical condition and location of the properties. It is best to contact the specific Sales Advisors indicated on the properties listed for further queries. 3. Buyers should make a bid through the online submission platform as indicated on www.buenaman---- from July 01, 2026 at 9:00:00AM to August 06, 2026 at 9:00:00AM. The official time indicated on the online registry will serve as our official time of receipt of the bids. 4. Buenamano shall not accept bids beyond the defined cut-off date and time. 5. Buenamano reserves the right to withdraw the Property/ies at any time before the deadline for submission of bids. 6. Buenamano reserves the right to reject any and all offers at its sole discretion, waive any defects or informality on the offers received and accepts the most advantageous to the Seller but does not guarantee that any award shall be made. Note: - It is expected from buyers to conduct due diligence including actual physical inspection of the property prior to submitting a bid. - Prices are subject to change without prior notice. - Misprints and other errors are unintended and do not constitute acts of misrepresentations, intentional non-disclosure, fraud or withholding of accurate details and pricing.

Glen, Abilay Norte, Oton, Iloilo
House and Lots * Sale shall be on """"""""as is where is"""""""" basis. * All offers are subject to Management approval. * Availability of units and prices are subject to change without prior notice. * Misprints should not be construed as misrepresentation of the property. Land For Sale in Balabag
Avida Village, Balabag, Pavia, Iloilo
Lot 4, Block 7, Avida Village Iloilo, Brgy. Balabag, Pavia City Iloilo 5001 Property Classification : Yellow Tag (with special concerns either on title, tax declaration, possession or other property documents) BIDDING GUIDELINES 1. Sale is on an “AS IS-WHERE IS” basis. 2. Bidders should make reasonable examination of property title/s and tax declaration/s and inspection of the physical condition and location of the properties. It is best to contact the specific Sales Advisors indicated on the properties listed for further queries. 3. Buyers should make a bid through the online submission platform as indicated on www.buenaman---- from July 01, 2026 at 9:00:00AM to August 06, 2026 at 9:00:00AM. The official time indicated on the online registry will serve as our official time of receipt of the bids. 4. Buenamano shall not accept bids beyond the defined cut-off date and time. 5. Buenamano reserves the right to withdraw the Property/ies at any time before the deadline for submission of bids. 6. Buenamano reserves the right to reject any and all offers at its sole discretion, waive any defects or informality on the offers received and accepts the most advantageous to the Seller but does not guarantee that any award shall be made. Note: - It is expected from buyers to conduct due diligence including actual physical inspection of the property prior to submitting a bid. - Prices are subject to change without prior notice. - Misprints and other errors are unintended and do not constitute acts of misrepresentations, intentional non-disclosure, fraud or withholding of accurate details and pricing.

Condo For Sale in Mandurriao
Donato Pison Avenue, Atria Park District, San Rafael, Mandurriao, Iloilo City
10th Floor, Unit AT3-1017, Donato Pison Ave, Avida Towers Atria, Tower 3, Mandurriao District, Brgy. San Rafael, Iloilo City Property Classification : Yellow Tag (with special concerns either on title, tax declaration, possession or other property documents) BIDDING GUIDELINES 1. Sale is on an “AS IS-WHERE IS” basis. 2. Bidders should make reasonable examination of property title/s and tax declaration/s and inspection of the physical condition and location of the properties. It is best to contact the specific Sales Advisors indicated on the properties listed for further queries. 3. Buyers should make a bid through the online submission platform as indicated on www.buenaman---- from July 01, 2026 at 9:00:00AM to August 03, 2026 at 9:00:00AM. The official time indicated on the online registry will serve as our official time of receipt of the bids. 4. Buenamano shall not accept bids beyond the defined cut-off date and time. 5. Buenamano reserves the right to withdraw the Property/ies at any time before the deadline for submission of bids. 6. Buenamano reserves the right to reject any and all offers at its sole discretion, waive any defects or informality on the offers received and accepts the most advantageous to the Seller but does not guarantee that any award shall be made. Note: - It is expected from buyers to conduct due diligence including actual physical inspection of the property prior to submitting a bid. - Prices are subject to change without prior notice. - Misprints and other errors are unintended and do not constitute acts of misrepresentations, intentional non-disclosure, fraud or withholding of accurate details and pricing.
